name: Chilie Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter the tomatoes.
2. Mix parsley and chili with the tomatoes in a bowl.
3. Chill mixture.
4. Combine remaining ingredients (olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, cayenne) in another bowl and set aside to rest.
5. Just before serving, mix the salad dressing with the salad.
